title: Histotechnician
description: Kaiser Permanente is seeking a Histotechnician to support our pathology laboratory in San Jose. You'll process tissue specimens and prepare microscope slides for diagnostic examination. This hybrid role offers competitive compensation and the opportunity to work in an integrated healthcare environment.
responsibilities: Process tissue specimens using manual and automated techniques; maintain quality standards throughout
Prepare slides through staining, mounting, and cover-slipping; ensure consistent preparation
Operate and maintain histology equipment; perform routine maintenance and troubleshoot issues
Maintain accurate specimen tracking and documentation throughout the workflow
Collaborate with pathologists and laboratory supervisors on quality improvement initiatives

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; completion of accredited histotechnology program
